item.title: Mundipharma/Cormedix Rezzayo
item.description:
• Summary: Mundipharma and Cormedix Inc. reported a positive trial win for Rezzayo (rezafungin), an echinocandin antifungal therapy. The data support expanding its use in invasive fungal infections. The partnership aims to commercialize Rezzayo across multiple markets.
  • MoAs: Rezafungin inhibits beta-glucan synthase, disrupting fungal cell wall synthesis, leading to cell death.
  • Sources: Fierce Pharma

item.title: Hepatitis B Vaccination Newborns
item.description:
• Summary: Studies published in JAMA examine the effectiveness and safety of hepatitis B vaccination in newborns. The research provides updated data on the immune response and long-term protection offered by the vaccine, reinforcing its importance in preventing perinatal transmission of hepatitis B virus.
  • MoAs: Hepatitis B vaccine (recombinant) - induces neutralizing antibodies against hepatitis B surface antigen (HBsAg).
  • Sources: STAT News
